name: Roasted Pasilla Chili Strips w/ Panela & Crema Agria
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Brand Panela cheese, cubed
1/2 cup Cacique Brand Crema Mexicana Agria
recipeInstructions:
1. Char the skins of the Pasilla chilies over an open flame.
2. Place in a plastic grocery bag to steam.
3. Peel skins off under running water.
4. Open peppers and seed and vein them.
5. Cut into 1/4" strips.
6. In a pan, sauté onion, chili strips, and garlic in oil until lightly browned.
7. Add tomatoes and cilantro.
8. Stir in Crema Agria and crumbled Panela cheese.
9. Heat slowly until all ingredients are well combined.
10. Serve as a side dish with grilled chicken or fish, or use in soft taco fillings.
